subject: Ops note: labrador deployment schedule for New York | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-6077
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of labrador work in New York. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Nikola Tesla. Reference initiative INIT-6077. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
